category_sources: Official Ansible Molecule documentation describes Molecule testing workflows for Ansible content.
source_facts.description says molecule is automated testing for Ansible roles.
display_name_sources: Official Ansible documentation and repository identify the project as Molecule.
docs_sources: Official Ansible Molecule documentation is hosted at docs.ansible.com/projects/molecule/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official KhronosGroup repository identifies MoltenVK as a Vulkan-on-Metal portability implementation.
source_facts.description says MoltenVK implements the Vulkan graphics and compute API on top of Metal.
